{{Quote|I will do my best to enlighten you with the knowledge I hold.|translated=1|Orsaa, to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Orsaa''' was a [[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]] of [[Lehon/Legends|Lehon]] who was a member of the [[Elders (Rakatan)|Elders]], a group of Rakata who refused to revert to [[cannibalism]] and barbarism like the tribes led by [[The One]]. He was the [[Keeper of History]], maintaining the knowledge and history of the [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]], the empire that had once ruled and [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] under the rule of the Rakata. Besides extensive knowledge and being one of the leading Elders, Orsaa, like almost all Rakata, had no innate ability to sense or use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], though his research was directed toward restoring the ability to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]].
